gethttps://api.example.com/customers/cus_ok

Fetch a single customer.

Responses
Response
application/json

                
{

        

        

            
  "data": {

        

        

            
    "id": "cus_ok"

        

        

            
  }

        

        

            
}

        

        

        

        

                
{

        

        

            
  "error": {

        

        

            
    "message": "Invalid customer id"

        

        

            
  }

        

        

            
}
